fields.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP sequence, consisting of pixel data and a display duration.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoderFrame` pairs an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap> with a frame
duration in milliseconds. Pass a span of frames to
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated*> to produce an animated WebP.

The struct stores a reference to an `SKPixmap` obtained from the source
image. When constructing from an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKBitmap> or
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKImage>, the pixmap is obtained by calling `PeekPixels()`
on the source object.

## Examples

```csharp
var frames = new SKWebpEncoderFrame[]
{
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(frame1Pixmap) { Duration = 100 },
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(frame2Pixmap) { Duration = 100 },
};
var options = new SKWebpEncoderOptions(SKWebpEncoderCompression.Lossy, 80);
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, options);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Initializes a new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> with the specified pixmap.

params.pixmap: The pixel data for this frame.

fields.summary: Initializes a new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> from the specified bitmap.

params.bitmap: The bitmap whose pixel data is used for this frame.

fields.summary: Initializes a new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> from the specified image.

params.image: The image whose pixel data is used for this frame.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the display duration of this frame in milliseconds.
fields.value: The number of milliseconds this frame is displayed before advancing to the next frame.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the pixel data for this frame.
fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> containing the pixel data for this frame.
